LanguageData.ELIFCH-46ETransport.label: CH-46E Sea Knight (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFCH-46ETransport.description: DESCRIPTION: The CH-46E is a helicopter designed for long range huge capacity transport of goods and personnel. BASIC STATS: Health: 1800 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 2000kg Speed: 6 Passenger Capacity: 1-16 Fuel Per Tile: 16 Fuel Capacity: 1760 Round Trip Range: 55 Full Range: 110 Internal Power: 2200w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
